overall.description: First-person perspective from a Mercedes truck cabin driving through snowy conditions in a truck simulator game. The journey progresses from rural highways through urban approaches and industrial zones, with active windshield wipers clearing falling snow from the windshield.

metal safety barrier running along the left edge of the road
metal safety barrier running along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving on a snow-covered highway through a rural winter landscape. Snow-laden trees line both sides of the road behind metal guardrails. A white sedan is visible ahead traveling in the same direction through the falling snow.

events.description: residential apartment buildings appear on the horizon indicating approach to urban area
passing overhead road sign indicating direction to Duisburg

agents.ego_description: continuing on highway as urban infrastructure and buildings come into view

highway direction sign with text indicating Duisburg
metal framework spanning the highway supporting traffic signs

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through the snowy landscape as residential buildings appear in the distance. The camera passes a sign for Duisburg and approaches an overhead sign gantry, indicating a transition from rural to urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with industrial infrastructure

large industrial building with flat roof and loading areas

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes an exit ramp, passing under a concrete overpass with a welcome sign. The surroundings transition to industrial infrastructure with power lines, warehouses, and exit barriers visible through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial road transitioning to highway

events.description: passing circular speed limit sign indicating 100 km/h

agents.ego_description: driving along industrial road before returning to main highway

segments.scene_description: Driving through an industrial zone with commercial warehouses and chain-link fences lining the right side. The vehicle passes a 100 km/h speed limit sign and transitions back to a highway section with snow-covered trees visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it travels from a rural winter highway into an industrial urban zone. It begins by driving through a snow-covered landscape lined with frozen trees and metal guardrails, following a white sedan through the falling snow. As the vehicle progresses, the rural scenery shifts toward an urban approach, passing a sign for Duisburg and an overhead gantry as residential buildings emerge in the distance. The camera then follows the truck down an exit ramp and under a concrete overpass, where the environment transforms into an industrial area characterized by power lines, warehouses, and exit barriers. Finally, the scene moves past chain-link fences and a speed limit sign within the commercial zone before transitioning back toward a highway section with distant snow-laden trees.
